sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107953" key="u(perfro/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερφρόν-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107953.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contempt,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θανάτου</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.238b</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:146" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.146</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
